name: The Wheel of Time RPG
description:
The wheel of time is one of my favorite fantasy series. Ironically enough I've only read the first three books. Can you blame me? It's a 14-book series for Christ's sake. Anyway, despite that I absolutely love it. Again the world building is Tolkien worthy. And so without further ado allow me to introduce you to it:

This world is canonically a far-flung future of Earth where things have reverted back to medieval times. So, your typical fantasy setting. On the surface anyway. In reality it's an incredibly dense and intricately crafted world. The most important three pieces of info you must learn are the One power, the breaking of the world and the dragon reborn.

The first thing we need to talk about it is the breaking of the world. The Lore goes like this. In the beginning the creator bound his antithesis (Shai 'tan) in Shayol Goul. It's a mountain range, think "Mordor". Anyway, fast forward a couple thousand years and humanity is doing pretty good. Having mastered the One power (the metaphysical driving magical force of the universe) they advanced far in their technology and stuff. About 3 thousand years ago, Aes sedai (users of the one power basically, sorcerers), fucked around and found out using the one power. They opened a gateway for the dark one to enter the world. Being the dark one, he covinced, coerced and consipired with Aes sedai and normal people alike to join his side. Shit went south pretty quick and the world was brought under the shadow. It was so bad that the 13 most powerful Aes Sedai of that day defected to his side and forever became known as the forsaken. In the end Lews Therin Telamon, the most powerful Aes Sedai of them all, the dragon went and lead hundred of his best in a last ditch attempt to defeat the shadow. They won. But the dark one, being the petty bastard that he was,permanently tainted the male half of the one power. After he was sealed away , male Aes sedai began to go insane. Lews therin went insane as well killing his entire family then raise enitre mountain around himself taking his own life. In a period of about 200 years or so every male Aes sedai went insane, their power breaking the world. Literally. Continents shifted, oceans boiled, climates were rewritten, mountains flattened and new ones raised. Humanity was brought to the brink of extinction. The breaking of the world ended with the death of the last male Aes sedai. When it was all said and done the planet's geography was completely altered. A prophecy would come which said that the Dragon would be reborn to face the dark once more in the last battle.

The One Power

### I. Foundational Principles & Metaphysics

* Origin & Purpose: The One Power is the energy that emanates from the True Source, the force the Creator made to literally turn the Wheel of Time and thus drive all of creation and reality.

* Duality: The True Source is split into two complementary yet opposing halves:

* ***Saidar*** (Female): Conceptualized as an infinite, irresistible river. To access it, a channeler must surrender to it, guide it, and flow with its current—a process called "embracing the Source." It is described as patient, all-encompassing, and cooperative.<
